rows.content: The Foreground Selection Panel may be edited by entering E next to the
Option you want to edit.  This will display the User Application Edit
Selection Panel.  New Foreground options may be created with the
S <newfile> command on the primary command line.
The User Application Edit Selection Panel is used to specify the entry
on the Foreground Selection Panel which is to be changed.  After you
enter a valid number, the User Application Definition panel is
The User Application Definition allows you to specify the following
USER APPLICATION NAME+- A symbolic name of your choice representing
the function performed by the application. This is the name you
type in the primary command field to execute the application.
APPLICATION DESCRIPTION+- Enter any descriptive text that you wish
to appear on the Foreground Selection Panel.
